sync_type: Unidirectional (ActiveCampaign → Slack via ActiveCampaign's Slack integration, Zapier, or webhooks)
popularity: medium — ActiveCampaign automation triggers Slack notifications for sales/marketing teams

authentication_requirements.activecampaign_side: API Token (Api-Key header). Webhook scopes: contacts, deals, automations.
authentication_requirements.slack_side: OAuth 2.0 Bot Token (xoxb-). Scopes: chat:write, channels:read.

common_use_cases: ActiveCampaign form submission → Slack new lead alert
ActiveCampaign contact tag added → Slack assignee notification
ActiveCampaign email bounce → Slack #support lead cleanup alert

activecampaign_endpoints.purpose: Create webhook to trigger Slack on AC events
Fetch contact details for Slack message

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: ActiveCampaign webhook payloads vary by event type. Contact webhook format differs from deal webhook. Slack message template breaks.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Create separate Zapier/Make Zaps per webhook type. Each Zap has a Slack template matching the specific webhook payload.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Slack 1 req/sec vs ActiveCampaign webhook burst
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: ActiveCampaign bulk tag update triggers webhooks for 100 contacts simultaneously. Middleware sends 100 Slack messages → 99 fail with 429.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Queue in middleware. Send at 1 req/sec. Or send aggregated summary: '100 contacts tagged as X in AC'.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: ActiveCampaign API rate limit on webhook responses
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: ActiveCampaign expects 200 response within 5s for webhooks. Slack rate limit causes middleware to delay. AC retries webhook.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Acknowledge AC webhook immediately (200). Process Slack message asynchronously.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Slack message too long with AC deal data
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: ActiveCampaign deal with extensive notes and custom fields produces 10K+ character Slack message. Slack truncates at 4,000 chars per block.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Truncate AC deal description to 500 chars in Slack message. Add 'View in ActiveCampaign' link for full deal details.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: AC webhook URL expires or changes
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: ActiveCampaign webhook URL changes when middleware URL changes. Old webhooks silently stop delivering events.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Document all active webhook URLs in AC. Set up monitoring: if no Slack messages expected but not received, check webhook URLs.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Escaped HTML in AC contact data
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: ActiveCampaign stores certain fields with HTML entities (& < >). Sent to Slack as raw text, rendering incorrectly.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Decode HTML entities in middleware before sending to Slack: & → &, < → <, > → >.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Slack bot not in channel — silent drop
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Slack bot removed from channel by admin. Middleware sends message but Slack silently drops it. No error returned (permissions).
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Call conversations.join before each chat.postMessage. Or check bot channel membership periodically.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Duplicate Slack alerts from AC webhook retries
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: AC retries webhook delivery if first attempt not acknowledged quickly enough. Middleware receives duplicate events, sends duplicate Slack messages.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Dedup by webhook event ID in middleware. Track processed event IDs in memory/data store.

community_solutions.solution: AC webhooks send a basic auth-like header. Ensure middleware validates the signature to reject fake webhook calls.
ActiveCampaign deals with 'Urgent' tag → Slack @here notification. Risk of over-notification. Use @here only for 'Critical' severity.
